tests.source_program:
;test
;current seed:939375826
; ModuleID = '/app/data/auto-opt/.tmp/tmpr5siot32.ll'
source_filename = "/app/data/auto-opt/.tmp/tmpr5siot32.ll"

define i1 @test(i8 %a) {
  %cmp1 = icmp ult i8 %a, 5
  %masked = and i8 %a, -2
  %cmp2 = icmp eq i8 %masked, 2
  %and = and i1 %cmp1, %cmp2
  %1 = sdiv i1 %cmp2, %and
  ret i1 %1
}
